acceptance_targets: [ch14_prose_01] Pass if, after revision, the reveal passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:258, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:297 contains no more than two non-UI stand-alone fragment paragraphs, and each retained fragment lands at a distinct turning point. Fail if the scene still relies on repeated one- and two-word narration beats to manufacture intensity.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after revision, the reveal passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:258, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:297 contains no more than two non-UI stand-alone fragment paragraphs, and each retained fragment lands at a distinct turning point. Fail if the scene still relies on repeated one- and two-word narration beats to manufacture intensity.
findings.evidence: Outside of on-screen interface text, the reveal repeatedly lands on clipped fragment paragraphs such as snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:168, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:169, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:258, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:297, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:299, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:301, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:305, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:337.
findings.problem: The chapter's shock rhythm leans too often on one-line and one-word narration beats. Used this many times in a single reveal scene, the cadence starts to feel preloaded rather than earned, and several beats drift into the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping instead of staying fully grammatical and pressure-specific.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the non-UI fragment beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:168, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:169, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:258, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:297, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:299, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:301, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:305, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:337 into fuller sentences tethered to Lena's body, thought, or immediate action. Keep only the few fragment punches that buy a genuinely new turn in pressure.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
